name: Squashed Potato Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Pierce the sweet potato with a fork and place it in the oven for 45 minutes.
3. When the sweet potato has cooled, cut it into 1/2-inch cubes.
4. Lower the heat to 375°F.
5. Steam the yellow squash and green pepper until slightly tender.
6. Lightly grease a 4 x 8 casserole pan with safflower oil.
7. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
8. Transfer the mixture to the casserole pan and place it back in the oven for 15 minutes.
